text:
You rendered descendant <Routes> (or called `useRoutes()`) at "/apoema" (under <Route path="/apoema">) but the parent route path has no trailing "*". This means if you navigate deeper, the parent won't match anymore and therefore the child routes will never render.

Please change the parent <Route path="/apoema"> to <Route path="/apoema/*">.
